subject: fix(debug): strengthen debug system — PWA update detection, debugLog coverage, logger noise
body:
PWA update detection was broken for installed users when app bundles
changed but sw.js didn't. Added version.json build stamp mechanism
(written at build time, fetched on launch) as a second detection path
independent of SW lifecycle. Also expanded debugLog coverage to critical
uninstrumented flows (identity, messages, chat, auth, notifications,
app state), standardized DebugSource types, fixed production console.*
leaks, and reduced ~40 verbose happy-path logger.log calls.

Tags: debug, pwa, code-quality, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor
